NAVAREA XIX 111/22
 NORWEGIAN SEA.
 1. ROCKET LAUNCHING SCHEDULED FROM ANDOYA SPACE OPERATIONS CENTER 0800 TO 1200 UTC
 FROM 15.AUG TO 21.AUG 22. 

 TRAFFIC IS REQUESTED TO BE AWARE OF THE FOLLOWING AREA :

 A. 67–19.3N 016–06.6E
 B. 70–36.2N 013–59.7E
 C. 70–39.3N 012–37.3E
 D. 70–09.4N 012–34.8E
 E. 69-15.6N 015-57.6E

 2. ANDOYA SPACE OPERATIONS CENTER CAN BE REACHED ON TEL 0047 76144426 OR VHF CHANNELS 14 AND 16.
